outlook_paragraph: SM shows moderate drilling activity with 10 active sites at decision date, 50% above the trailing average, driven by one newly activated pad alongside nine continuous sites. With WTI averaging $64.42 and realized prices at a slight discount, revenue is supported by stable operations in a mid-tier commodity environment. The company's partial segment exposure (55%) limits full leverage to basin-wide momentum, but continuity in activity suggests reliable production into year-end 2022. The deterministic revenue forecast is set at $666.4M.
